case_payload.summary: A system receives a desire-pressure input (goal state) and searches for admissible low-cost routes from current state, without guaranteeing delivery.
case_payload.claim_attempt: The desire-pressure input allows the system to reweight admissible forward paths toward the goal without promising delivery.

why: goal-state input triggers reweighting of admissible paths
low-cost routes are prioritized without delivery guarantee
Markov bridge ensures valid intermediate states
